posts.text:
Wow. Folding to the alt-right just as we need solidarity. 

Abby is a white-supremacy apologist. Never forget this. 

Without white supremacy, where would America be? Would these kids have even lived on the continent? It’s all downstream.

Abby is being censored by corpo hacks at CNN and folding to their will. 

Remember, Abby, you can quit and go independent anytime you want (just like me!).


Abby D. Phillip (@abbydphillip)

I want to correct something I said last night. The bombs thrown in Ne

Texas District 30 voters: Today is primary day—get out there and vote for the incredible Jasmine Crockett! She's the effective fighter we need in Congress, taking on the tough battles with smarts and fire. As I said, if Jasmine Crockett is the most effective fighter, give me Jasmine Crockett... just give me her! Let's keep her representing us strong! #VoteCrockett #TX30


Michael Malice (@michaelmalice)

if you are a Democrat please vote for Jasmine Crockett in today's Senate primary, we Texans

One of these men has been convicted of sex crimes involving children. 

The other 2 don’t care about that.


Michael Cargill (@michaeldcargill)

Big dogs gotta eat!!  Range day with Tommy G. & Cody Wilson. More Guns Equal Less Crime!







— https://nitter.net/michaeldcargill/status/1997109127382802465#m

I quit MSNBC, for the record


Selene Mariposa (@Selene_Mariposa)

Here are the top 50 liberal grifters to Block and Mute:

1. @RBReich (Robert Reich, economist and commentator)  
2. @maddow (Rachel Maddow, MSNBC host)  
3. @JoyAnnReid (Joy Reid, MSNBC host)  
4. @krassenstein (Brian Krassenstein, commentator)  
5. @EdKrassenstein (Ed Krassenstein, commentator)  
6. @Acyn (Viral clip account of conservative moments)  
7. @cenkuygur (Cenk Uygur, The Young Turks)  
8. @AnaKasparian (Ana Kasparian,

Disarm the police. 

It’s clear even they don’t have any lawful use for guns, either.


BAINGAN KA BHARTA (@the_eggplantt)

Disgusting!

Three female police personnel were there at Bondi beach at the time of shooting. They were seen hiding behind the cars. 

Incompetent 

Dozens of lives could be saved if there were some competent cops instead of these cowards.

#bondibeach

Video
  







— https://nitter.net/the_eggplantt/status/2000440593756168330#m

Piers is right. And Norm would have been right there with him.

The worst part about this massacre will be the backlash Muslims get.




Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

It was a Muslim hero who disarmed one of them.



— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2000208446822518916#m

We need gun control in Australia NOW


vrsaljak (@vrsaljak)

one of the most iconic beaches in the world bondi beach. 
the government HAVE TO do something, this is disgusting.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/vrsaljak/status/2000126679189168271#m

Jingle Bells
Orange man smells
JD laid an egg
Kash’s Plane has something to explain
And his girlfriend is here to stay

Hey

Jingle Bell
Orange man smells
Licking Clinton’s Crème Brûlée 
Pam Bondi was spotted island hopping
And the Butler shooter went away 

Hey

Disarm* 

If you can’t spell, you shouldn’t carry a gun. 

Just say you hate women, oinker.


Dan Lavelle (@DeputySheriff54)

Unarm the police!? You really are a stupid twit! You’re unemployed because of your hate, rage, and racism. But you’re more than that, you’re a smelly gash! Reply women! PS, every time you see an apple you will think of me. I’m now living rent free in your head! LOL!!



— https://nitter.net/DeputySheriff54/status/1994069988802433102#m

Eat the cash, leave the fetus

  



NineNails (@AocDeport35418)

did she eat it then? where is that money?



— https://nitter.net/AocDeport35418/status/1998183531265286200#m

On tonight’s TJRS: Trump & Bibi’s war is lost-they just haven’t gotten the memo yet. Worse: they think they'll take Cuba next. And we break down the ironies of Trump’s MAGA Christian faith looking the other way at Jeffrey Epstein while predators abound in their midst. www.youtube.com/live/_QHnn2O...

ICYMI: We broke down the multiple Target Boycotts with journalist Georgia Fort and activists Nina Turner and Tamika Mallory, then Dave Zirin dropped in to talk Iran, world football, and the Trump-Epstein soiled World Cup. www.youtube.com/live/6IRQt0T...
@toure.bsky.social @congressmanraja.bsky.social and reps from the Florida Immigrant Coalition!

On this Friday TJRS: war, death and robots. While the regime stays cagey about what exactly is happening on the ground in Iran, the tech-broligarchy paints a dystopian vision of the future should AI continue to worm it's way into every vestige of American life. 
www.youtube.com/live/91Megdr...
The accuracy ... almost makes me approve of AI lol
We warned you about putting fundamentally leaky and insecure "AI" systems into the research and education environment, bro! We fucken told you bro!
All I know is I’m not going back in Target, maybe ever. They are Hobby Lobby to me. And I’d never shop there either. #stillboycotting

As the Epstein cover-up continues, Trump denies responsibility for the war on Iran while Israel deploys white phosphorus and bombs a 92-year-old Lebanese woman’s home … again. @repstansbury.bsky.social @whitehouse.senate.gov & @azalawieh.bsky.social join the show www.youtube.com/live/TjxAtia...
And yet another TJRS winner! Congrats Brigadier General Harris! 🎉 www.11alive.com/article/news...
Another TJRS guest turned WINNER! Congrats Scott! www.wdam.com/2026/03/11/u...

Feels like quite the talking point 
@joyannreid.bsky.social @katiephang.bsky.social @jimacosta.bsky.social @wajali.bsky.social

On tonight's TJRS: we talk to a Democrat looking to fill the seat being vacated by Marjorie Taylor Greene (the election is tomorrow!) a Dem Senate candidate from Kentucky, one of our fave "Fighting Dems" in Congress and one of the smartest voices on all things Iran.  www.youtube.com/live/DhecRBQ...
President Trump: "Now I am become Death, the destroyer of worlds."

To overcome racial inequality, we must confront our history. (@eji.org)
calendar.eji.org/racial-injus...

If you can't even manage to wipe the stupid smirk off your face while writing about a war that started with 160 children being bombed in a school, it's time to start thinking about the decisions that led you here.
If this is the future of journalism then journalism is dead.

On TJRS Fridays: Obama lauds Jesse Jackson and slams Trump, @levparnas.bsky.social is running for congress and spilling the tea on Team Trump, and @akbarshahidahmed.huffpost.com reveals how sadistic the incentives are for the U.S. and Israel in Iran. www.youtube.com/live/UTioVui...
Me and @Katie Phang are doing a thing! Skip #orangedummy #sotu and watch #thepeoplesstateoftheunion instead! @MeidasTouch @MoveOnOrg & at thejoyreidshow.com ‼️🇺🇸🎤 #fyp
#happyfireaversary to meeee!!! And thank all of you for your 🥰 and support ❤️#tjrs #fyp #reiders
Stay #moisturizedandunbothered fam! www.maisondushea.com #reiders (and no i am not a paid spokesperson. This is just a small business I love.) ❤️
See y’all at 6! #tjrs link in bio #fyp

Deepest apologies to the gorgeous ladies of @sgrhoupdates & @zphibinc1920 for my error on @joyreidshow tonight! Indeed, @barbaralee is a proud member of Sigma Gamma Rho! Sending all the blue sisterly love! 💙💙❤️
See you at 6 ET #reiders #fyp
